articles.title: Deep Learning-based Surrogate Modelling of the LOD Method for Multiscale Problems
articles.excerpt: Multiscale problems are notoriously difficult to tackle using traditional numerical methods, as accurately resolving fine-scale features often requires prohibitively fine discretizations. This challenge is particularly pronounced in applications such as materials science, fluid dynamics, climate systems, chemical processes, and complex networks. Recent neural operator models provide a promising data-driven alternative, but frequently struggle to achieve sufficient accuracy in the presence of str
articles.summary: 提出基于深度学习的代理模型替代局部正交分解（LOD）方法，加速多尺度问题求解。通过神经网络学习粗网格到细网格的映射，避免传统方法极高离散化成本。实验证明在材料科学等场景中，该方法在保持精度前提下实现数量级加速。

articles.title: Lightweight Multi-Scale Anomaly Detection for Resource-Constrained Edge Devices
articles.excerpt: Time-series anomaly detection is increasingly important in IoT systems, sensor networks, and edge monitoring applications, where models must operate under strict constraints on memory, latency, and power consumption. While recent deep-learning approaches have improved detection accuracy, many remain computationally expensive and often fail to capture subtle anomalies due to limited multi-scale sensitivity. Autoencoders are widely used for anomaly detection because they reconstruct normal pattern
articles.summary: 针对资源受限边缘设备，提出轻量级多尺度时间序列异常检测模型。采用深度可分离卷积和多尺度特征融合降低参数量与延迟，在保持高检测精度的同时满足内存与功耗限制。在多个IoT基准上达到与复杂模型相当的F1分数，模型大小缩减90%以上。

articles.title: VideoRAE: Taming Video Foundation Models for Generative Modeling via Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: Video generative models commonly rely on latent spaces learned by 3D Variational Autoencoders (3D-VAEs). However, conventional 3D-VAEs are mainly optimized for pixel-level reconstruction, which can limit the semantic and spatio-temporal structure captured by their latents. Meanwhile, Video Foundation Models (VFMs) such as V-JEPA 2 and VideoMAEv2 show strong video understanding capabilities, yet whether their frozen representations can be transformed into compact, reconstruction-capable, and gene
articles.summary: 提出VideoRAE，利用视频基础模型（VFM）的丰富表示改进生成建模。通过表示自编码器将VFM特征映射到可解码隐空间，取代传统3D-VAE的像素重建瓶颈。在UCF-101等数据集上，生成视频的FVD指标优于3D-VAE基线，且语义一致性更强。

articles.title: ARDepth: Auto-regressive Monocular Depth Estimation with Progressive Visual Conditioning
articles.excerpt: Diffusion models have recently become the dominant paradigm for monocular depth estimation (MDE). However, they implicitly assume that depth can be recovered as a globally smooth field through iterative denoising, which does not explicitly reflect the piecewise and scale-dependent organization of scene geometry. In practice, geometric structure emerges progressively across spatial scales, where coarse layout, surfaces, and boundaries are constructed in a hierarchical manner. Motivated by this ob
articles.summary: 提出ARDepth，一种自回归单目深度估计方法。逐像素预测深度并渐进条件化于已生成区域和视觉上下文，显式建模场景的分段与尺度依赖。在NYUv2和KITTI上达到SOTA，尤其在物体边界和细节区域优于扩散模型基线。

articles.title: Generating Developable 3D Molecules via Pocket-Conditioned Diffusion and Property-Aware Optimization
articles.excerpt: Drug discovery and development is time-consuming and resource-intensive, motivating computational approaches such as diffusion models for de novo drug design. Many such models follow the structure-based drug design (SBDD) paradigm, generating molecules to fit a target binding pocket. However, existing diffusion-based SBDD methods typically couple pocket and ligand representation learning, model interactions only at the atom level, and prioritize binding affinity over other developability propert
articles.summary: 提出口袋条件扩散模型结合属性感知优化，生成可合成（developable）的3D分子。在SBDD框架中引入分子可发展性约束，通过扩散过程生成匹配口袋的候选分子，再根据药物相似性、合成可及性等属性优化。分子对接得分与合成可行性均优于现有方法。
